n and health.
Saturn.—Reduced in health with cerebral complaints,
loses his position. If with the Moon, likelihood of insanity.
Becomes heterodox and irreligious. He will suffer from
windy complaints. He may incur the wrath of authorities.
He may incarcerated if the 8th and 6th lords join the Lagna.
Mercury.—Health comes to normal, fame will spread,
education will progress, respect from those in position. His
interest in occult studies will further intensify. If afflicted,
there will manifest a sort of headache.
Ketu.—He will suffer from fevers and some
complaints which cannot be cured by medicine. The body
becomes weak and emaciated. There will be boils due to
excessive heat. Reputation may also suffer. Mind will be
uneasy.
Venus.—Commits sins without being able to control
passions. Health will improve. Happiness will manifest.
The body becomes energised.
In the sub-periods the lords will have the same
influence as in the periods stated above. In this case,
